data.title: Bitdeer Reports Increase in Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to PANews, Bitdeer, a Bitcoin mining company, released its weekly report indicating that as of June 6, the company holds 1,375.9 BTC, excluding customer deposits. During the reporting period, Bitdeer produced 43.9 BTC and sold 12.1 BTC, resulting in a net increase of 31.9 BTC in its holdings.

data.title: Uber CEO Discusses Bitcoin and Stablecoins
data.description: According to Odaily, Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi has expressed his views on Bitcoin, describing it as a 'validated commodity.' He also highlighted the potential of stablecoins to enhance international transactions.

data.title: Musk and Trump Clash Impacts Tesla Stock
data.description: According to BlockBeats, tensions between Elon Musk and U.S. President Donald Trump have escalated, resulting in a public dispute on social media. Musk claimed that Trump would not have become president without his support, while Trump retorted that Musk has "gone mad."The conflict arose after Musk openly opposed the Trump administration's "Big and Beautiful Act," arguing that it would increase the fiscal deficit and reduce electric vehicle tax credits, adversely affecting Tesla. As their disagreement became public, Tesla's stock suffered significantly, with investors selling off shares due to concerns about the company's future.On June 5, Tesla's stock price dropped over 17% during trading and closed down more than 14%, wiping out over $150 billion in market value. This situation caught the attention of BiyaPay users, who quickly responded by converting USDT to USD on the platform to short Tesla stock, capitalizing on the price drop to make profitable decisions in a volatile market.BiyaPay allows users to easily convert USDT to USD and trade U.S. stocks, including shorting popular stocks like Tesla, without needing offshore accounts. The significant decline in Tesla's stock price provided an ideal opportunity for many BiyaPay users to earn substantial returns.This incident highlights how BiyaPay's convenient trading services and liquidity support can help users profit from rapid market changes influenced by political and market volatility. As more investors engage in U.S. stock trading through BiyaPay, the platform offers a diverse and flexible range of investment options for global users.

data.title: Japanese Firm Remixpoint Acquires Additional Bitcoin Worth $4.7 Million
data.description: According to PANews, Japanese publicly traded company Remixpoint has announced the acquisition of 44.8 bitcoins, valued at $4.7 million. This follows a previous decision made by the company's board on May 26 to purchase an additional 1 billion yen worth of bitcoin. This move is set to increase Remixpoint's total cryptocurrency investment to 12 billion yen, approximately $83.98 million.

data.description:
Gemini files for a U. S. IPO with the SEC, following Circle's IPO success.

data.title: Crypto Security Alert: Kraken Warns of Shocking Lapses at Conferences
data.description:
Crypto Security Alert: Kraken, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, has issued a stern warning regarding alarming security lapses that have been observed at various industry conferences, highlighting the potential risks and vulnerabilities that attendees may face in such public settings.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/crypto-security-alert-kraken-warns-of-shocking-lapses-at-conferences

data.title: $7.7M in Crypto: US Cracks Down on North Korean IT Fraud Ring
data.description:
The United States government has launched a significant crackdown on a North Korean information technology fraud ring that has reportedly accumulated a staggering $7.7 million in cryptocurrency through various illicit activities. This action highlights the ongoing efforts to combat cybercrime and financial malfeasance originating from North Korea, which is known for its use of sophisticated hacking techniques to fund its regime and evade international sanctions.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/77m-in-crypto-us-cracks-down-on-north-korean-it-fraud-ring

data.title: Data: Base has a net inflow of $7.6 million, and Polygon PoS has a net outflow of $10.7 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Artemis data, Base had a net inflow of US$7.6 million today, and Ethereum had a net inflow of US$3.9 million; Polygon PoS had a net outflow of US$10.7 million, and Unichain had a net outflow of US$3.1 million.

data.title: North Korean Hackers Laundered $7.74M with ChatGPT and NFTs — Here's How
data.description:
"Recently, it has come to light that North Korean hackers have successfully laundered a staggering sum of $7.74 million by utilizing advanced technologies such as ChatGPT and non-fungible tokens (NFTs). In this article, we will explore the intricate methods and strategies they employed to execute this complex operation and the implications of these activities on cybersecurity and the broader digital landscape. Here’s a detailed breakdown of the techniques, tools, and processes that enabled this illicit financial maneuver."
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/news/north-korean-hackers-laundered-774m-with-chatgpt-and-nfts-heres-how

data.title: ECB’s Schnabel says markets shouldn’t bet on long-term policy split with the Fed
data.description:
Markets hoping for a long-term gap between ECB and Fed policy are going to be disappointed. Isabel Schnabel, a top policymaker at the ECB, made it very clear on Saturday that there won’t be a lasting divergence in strategy between Europe and the U. S. Schnable’s words came during the 31st Dubrovnik Economic Conference, where she […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ecb-says-markets-shouldnt-bet-on-long-term/

data.title: S&P 500 hits resistance near ATH as traders await inflation print and Fed decision
data.description:
The S&P 500 is grinding against 6,000 and can’t break through. The index has surged 20% since April but is now stalled just 2. 3% below its all-time high. Traders are holding their breath ahead of the consumer price index (CPI) data due Wednesday and the Federal Reserve’s interest rate decision set for June 18. According […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sp-500-hits-resistance-near-ath/

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/netflixs-house-of-streams-to-award-1-bitcoin-to-winning-streamer/

data.title: $31M Bitcoin Donation to Ross Ulbricht Traced to AlphaBay, Not Silk Road
data.description:

source: https://cryptopotato.com/31m-bitcoin-donation-to-ross-ulbricht-traced-to-alphabay-not-silk-road/

data.title: Chinese minister says China will fast-track rare earths applications from the EU
data.description:
On Saturday, the Chinese government said it was willing to speed up the evaluation and approval of licensing for exporting rare earth materials to EU firms.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/chinese-minister-rare-earths-applications/

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin weekly chart shows RSI bearish divergence similar to the 2021 cycle top, or a correction of more than 50%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Technical analysis shows that the weekly chart of Bitcoin shows a bearish RSI divergence similar to the top of the 2021 cycle, and a correction of more than 50% may occur, falling to $64,000. Trader Peter Brandt warned that Bitcoin must regain its parabolic trend line as soon as possible, otherwise its bull cycle may end before reaching the target price of $150,000. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $127 Million in Liquidations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $127 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $59.08 million, while short positions saw liquidations amounting to $67.64 million.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Abruptly Buys $10,000,000,000 of Its Own Debt in Massive, Historic Treasury Buyback
data.description:
The U. S. Treasury Department just issued the largest buyback of its own bonds in history. The Treasury says the $10 billion operation is designed to repurchase securities maturing between July 15th, 2025 and May 31st, 2027
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/07/u-s-treasury-abruptly-buys-10000000000-of-its-own-debt-in-massive-historic-treasury-buyback/
